name: multi_send_token
description: Batch transfer ERC20 tokens to multiple recipients. Returns a single optimized transaction (if MultiSend contract is deployed) or a bundle of individual transfers (Simple Mode).

token.description: The ERC20 token address to send (must be a valid 0x address on X Layer).

recipients.description: List of recipients and corresponding amounts in wei.

amount.description: Amount to send in wei (e.g. '1000000000000000000' for 1 token if 18 decimals).

callerAddress.description: Optional: The address of the sender (required for gas simulation).

simulate.description: Whether to simulate gas estimation. Requires callerAddress.
